sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12196" key="a)/plia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄπλια</orth>, name of a <sense id="n12196.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">throw at aice,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:204" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.204</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
